title: Missing observer notifications in callback RX path
description:
## Location
python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py:781

## Description
The _get_rx_result_internal method does not call self._observers.notify() for 'on_rx_success' or 'on_collision' events. Observers registered via add_observer() will not receive callbacks for receptions or collisions that occur through the callback-based RX path (deliver_pending_packets).

## Failure Scenario
Test harness registers a SimulationObserver to count RX events via on_rx_success callback. Node receives packets through enter_rx_mode/deliver_pending_packets. Observer's on_rx_success is never called, causing the test harness to report 0 receptions even though packets were delivered. Visualization tools or event loggers miss events.

## Category
correctness
